title: Petroman: Bubble Blitz
description: Petroman cleans up Mango Metro one bubble at a time in this original single-screen arcade platformer. Trap smog creatures in clean-air bubbles, pop them before they escape, chain score multipliers, collect upgrades and defeat the Smog King across twelve handcrafted stages.

controls.desktop: Arrow keys/A-D move, Space/W jump, X/K/J bubbles, P/Escape pause
controls.mobile: On-screen movement, jump and bubble buttons
